_doc: Warm Ages palette shift (art-bible §3 + §9). Anchors sampled from the LimeZu source tiles used in the town atlas (tsx palette-shift.mts --sample <png>); targets pull the world onto the art-bible warm spine: the cold pale sidewalk -> sunlit sandy PATH (the #1 'generic' fix), asphalt -> warm packed earth, grass -> earthy olive foliage, teal water -> de-neoned warm blue, and any stray cool prop accents -> warm. SHIFT not repaint: applyPaletteShift moves each pixel by the nearest anchor delta with linear falloff over `radius`, so whole shading ramps travel together and detail survives.

entries.note: sidewalk lit face (dominant) -> warm sunlit sand; this is what makes the GROUND read warm
sidewalk mid -> warm tan (§3 sunlit ground #C2A878 lean)
sidewalk grout/shadow -> warm brown (§3 #2E2018 lean, lifted)
asphalt -> warm packed-earth PATH (§3 earth #8A5A3C, deepened)
grass -> earthy olive foliage (§3 foliage mid #6E8C52)
stray dark teal -> warm shadow green
stray light blue glass -> warm grey (no electric blue)
